name: Matching Tasks Assignment to Craftsmen
description: Notifies matching craftsmen when a new task is published

parameters.jsCode:
const craftsman = $('Check Daily Quota').json; const task = $('Parse Task Data').json[0]; return [{ email: craftsman.email, subject: `Nova povpraševanja: ${task.description}`, htmlBody: `

Nova povpraševanja za vas!

Kategorija: ${task.category}

Lokacija: ${task.location}

Proračun: €${task.budget}

Poglej povpraševanja

`, craftmanId: craftsman.id, taskId: task.taskId }]
